description: Exists in Payments but not in Sales
ai_root_cause_analysis: The data discrepancy is due to a synchronization error between payment and sales systems post-transaction.
The root cause is a rounding error or truncation in the payment processing system when handling currency values to two decimal places.
The root cause is a misconfiguration in the amount mapping between sales records and payment processing fields within the Stripe integration settings.

description: Transaction appears multiple times in Sales staging
ai_root_cause_analysis: The root cause for the duplicate entry is a failure to implement proper transaction deduplication logic within the data processing pipeline before insertion into the Sales staging table.

The root cause is a failed transaction due to insufficient credit card authorization or declined payment attempt by the issuing bank for an unrecognized amount of NULL sales recorded in the system at that time.
The root cause is a decimal rounding error during data entry or conversion in the payment processing system for wire transfers.
